rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: The English Conversation class will focus on meaningful interaction between students and with the instructor. The class will include activities that require students to use speech in a spontaneous manner as well as activities that develop students' listening and pronunciation skills.
aims:
KU English Conversation is a practice-based course aimed at developing conversational skills in English. The course objectives are as
follows:
・ develop English communication ability, emphasizing speaking and listening skills
・ develop an operational understanding of grammar, particularly spoken grammar
・ improve English pronunciation skills (both segmental and suprasegmental/prosody)
・ activate learned English and improve fluency
・ build awareness of the socially appropriate use of language according to context
・ develop ability to negotiate meaning in communication
・ develop cultural understanding as it relates to English language use
・ foster intercultural understanding
・ provide students with an English-only intercultural classroom experience
goals: Develop English communication ability, emphasizing speaking and listening skills
Build awareness of the socially appropriate use of language according to context
Develop cultural understanding as it relates to English language use

plan.text: Group speaking 1: Something you like to eat
Group speaking 2: A city you like
Group speaking 3: Where you like to go on holiday
Group speaking 4: A film you enjoyed watching
Group speaking 5: Your plans for the future
Group speaking 6: Something you like to drink
Group speaking 8: A pet you have or have had
Group speaking 9: What you do to keep fit
Group speaking 10: Something you're looking forward to
Group speaking 11: What you do to relax
Group A final course assessment: (KU rubric: keep going, content, pronunciation, grammar/vocabulary)
Group B final course assessment: (KU rubric: keep going, content, pronunciation, grammar/vocabulary)

textbooks: All materials will be provided by the instructor
prereq: This class is available to all first-year students and is a requirement for graduation.
prep: Students will be required to review conversation, language functions and techniques in class to prepare for future lessons and class assessments.

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
語学に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
